title: Create finance record-keeping application

requirements.text: Create a backend data model to store financial records with fields for date, description, amount, category (income/expense), and unique identifier
acceptanceCriteria: Financial records can be stored with date, description, amount, and category
Each record has a unique identifier
Records persist across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Implement backend functions to add new financial records, retrieve all records, and delete records by ID
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add new financial records
Users can retrieve a list of all their financial records
Users can delete specific records by ID

requirements.text: Create a frontend form to input new financial records with fields for date, description, amount, and category selection (income or expense)
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes date picker, text input for description, numeric input for amount, and category selector
Form validates that all required fields are filled before submission
Successful submission adds the record to the backend and refreshes the display

requirements.text: Display all financial records in a sortable table showing date, description, amount, category, and a delete action
acceptanceCriteria: Records are displayed in a table format
Table shows date, description, amount, and category for each record
Each record has a delete button that removes it from the list
Income and expense entries are visually distinguished

requirements.text: Calculate and display total income, total expenses, and net balance based on all recorded transactions
acceptanceCriteria: Summary section shows total income amount
Summary section shows total expenses amount
Summary section shows net balance (income minus expenses)
Totals update automatically when records are added or deleted

requirements.text: Design a clean, professional interface with a cohesive visual theme using warm earth tones (terracotta, sage green, cream) with clear typography and organized card-based layouts that convey financial clarity and trust
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm earth tones consistently throughout the interface
Typography is clear and readable with appropriate hierarchy
Layout uses card-based components for organizing information
Overall design conveys professionalism and financial trustworthiness

nonGoals: Multi-user authentication or user-specific record isolation
Export to CSV or other formats
